steps: Combine lysozyme and RNase A %s %s Final Concentration For 15 ml For 30 ml 1.15 mg/ml Lysozyme 17.31 mg Lysozyme 34.62 mg Lysozyme 200 µg/ml RNase A 100 mg/ml 30 µl RNase A 100 mg/ml 60 µl RNase A 100mg/ml Note: Using slightly old RNase is fine - I keep mine in a drawer at RT and Chon and others confirmed that several year old RNase should be OK, no need to use extra of it. Lysozyme should always be prepared fresh on day of use RNase A catalog # 19101 Lysozyme from chicken egg white Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #L6876
Filter-sterilize through 0.2 µm filter Sterile Acrodisc® Syringe Filters with HT Tuffryn® Membrane Contributed by users Catalog #4192
creator: Bonnie Poulos
